value.value: Can only open draft battle boards
Cannot open battle board with no dishes
Can only start voting on open battle boards
Cannot add dishes to finalized board
Cannot remove dishes from finalized board
Can only vote when board is in voting status
Cannot vote on finalized battle board
Can only finalize boards in voting status
Cannot finalize an already finalized battle board
Cannot finalize board with no data
Battle board must be linked to an event

policies.name: BattleBoardManagement
policies.message: Kitchen staff and above can manage battle boards

policies.name: BattleBoardFinalize
policies.message: Only leads and above can finalize battle boards

policies.name: BattleBoardVote
policies.message: All kitchen staff can vote on battle boards
